summary: RETEST iteration 2 (frontend-only). All previously-blocked features now PASS after the items-hydration fix in mockApi.listTransactions. Verified: Alt+R Return modal opens without crash, lists TRX-20260622-0001 with item count, renders both line items on the right, accepts qty + reason, processes return (toast 'Retur berhasil disimpan' + modal closes). Alt+C Close Shift shows correct Expected Cash = 510.000 (opening 500000 + cashSales 10000 + pettyIn 0 - pettyOut 0), difference = 0, confirm redirects to /login. F12 sync toast 'Sinkronisasi selesai' shown. F2 logout navigates to /login and clears JWT (when not blocked by an open modal). Status bar shows ONLINE (emerald-400 green dot), shift number SH-35042239, user, and TRX# correctly. All previously-passing flows (login, open shift, scan 8991111000011 + 8990000000226 with stacking, F5 cash payment 10000 with change 4.000, finalize → new TRX#) still pass.

ui_bugs.issue: Radix a11y warning still present: 'Warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby={undefined} for DialogContent'. Carried over from iteration 1. Cosmetic/console-only.

action_items: (Optional, LOW) Add <DialogDescription> or aria-describedby to every shadcn DialogContent to silence Radix a11y warnings.

(Optional, LOW) F-key shortcuts (F2, F12, Alt+R, Alt+C, etc.) are silently blocked whenever any modal is open (POSPage.jsx line 98: anyModalOpen guard). After login the OpenShiftModal auto-opens and a user who instinctively hits F2 to log out will see nothing happen — consider whitelisting F2 as an always-active escape hatch, or surface a brief toast that the shortcut was blocked.

(Carry-over from iteration 1, LOW) posStore.calcLine still clamps lineTotal with Math.max(0, ...) — sign preservation for RETURN mode is now handled in ReturnModal by negating qty/lineTotal at submit, so functionally fine, but the comment in posStore says 'preserves sign for RETURN mode' which doesn't match the code. Either align or remove the comment.
(Carry-over, LOW) trxCounter in posStore.js is in-memory only — full page reload resets it to 1 within an active shift. Persist per-shift counter to Dexie.
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: mockApi.listTransactions now correctly hydrates items from db.transaction_items per transaction (lines 54-64). Single source of truth preserved, ReturnModal/TransactionListModal contract honored.
ReturnModal now defensively uses (selected.items || []) and selected.items?.map?.() guards — good belt-and-suspenders coverage even after the hydration fix.
POSPage.jsx remains ~250 lines with 9 modal-open booleans + a ~100-line keydown handler. Extract useShortcuts + useModalState for maintainability (not blocking).
Radix DialogContent a11y warnings persist on every modal — single shared <DialogDescription className="sr-only">…</DialogDescription> per modal would fix all of them in one PR.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (15/15 scenarios verified: login valid, open shift, scan + stacking, F1 qty, F4 search, F5 cash + change + finalize, Save Pending + F7, Alt+P petty, Alt+R return full flow, Alt+C close shift math + redirect, F12 sync toast, F2 logout, Status bar ONLINE + shift, TRX# autoincrement)

test_credentials: cashier / 1234 (verified). manager / 9999 not retested in this iteration.
seed_data_creation: None. Dexie seedIfEmpty auto-seeds 25 products, 4 customers, 2 users on first load. IndexedDB + localStorage cleared at the start of each test run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All previously-CRITICAL Return modal bug is fully fixed. Future iterations can focus on: (a) manager role + role-gated actions (F3 setup, void/refund permissions), (b) the petty-cash impact on Expected Cash (currently Expected = opening + cashSales + pettyIn - pettyOut — verified zero/zero case only, add a test with non-zero petty in/out), (c) F6 Daftar Trx modal (also reads items from listTransactions — should now render correctly thanks to the same fix), (d) silencing Radix DialogDescription a11y warnings, (e) the F-key + anyModalOpen interaction noted in action_items.
rca of the issue: Iteration 1's critical ReturnModal crash had RCA: mockApi.listTransactions returned only transaction headers (no items). The fix applied in this iteration hydrates items per transaction via Promise.all + db.transaction_items.where('transactionId').equals(t.id).toArray(). Verified in this run: TRX-20260622-0001 now appears in the left list with '2 item' subtitle and both line items (INDOMIE GORENG ORIGINAL 85G x1 3.500, BENG BENG CHOCOLATE 20G x1 2.500) render on the right pane. No PageError thrown. Return submission persisted via api.createReturn → db.returns and toast 'Retur berhasil disimpan' shown, modal auto-closes. Fix is correct and complete.
